testcase.name: test_get_cineconnect_interests
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_batch_features.py:31: in test_get_cineconnect_interests assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 404: {"detail":"Message not found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_api_health

failure.message: AssertionError: assert None == 'ok' + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf862da53ec80>('status') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf862da53ec80> = {'message': 'Shadow Wolves Productions API'}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_batch_features.py:306: in test_api_health assert data.get("status") == "ok" E AssertionError: assert None == 'ok' E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf862da53ec80>('status') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf862da53ec80> = {'message': 'Shadow Wolves Productions API'}.get
